text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day of the Uma Kids<n>Footrace Meet,
a local community<n>event. As academy staff and
the<n>participants' guardians gather around<n>to
watch the children compete...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: LET'S GO, SISTER!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The explosive shout catches me by<n>surprise, and
I turn to see who it is.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I want you to show me your speed,<n>power, and
overflowing Bakushin<n>energy! Leave it all on the
field today!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Okay, Sis! I won't let you down!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh? You there, Trainer! Let me<n>guess—you've
already caught on to<n>my sister's potential!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You've got an eye for talent! Don't<n>look away,
because she's going to<n>show you her Bakushin
spirit!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Yes! Rest assured, she won't<n>disappoint!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: She's the best sister ever! Top of herclass and a great cook to boot! Markmy words—she'll make history intoday's race! Gasp?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wait, that means... everyone will<n>nominate her as
class representative!<n>Finally! My sister! A class
rep in her<n>own right!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
Um, I'll pass on that, actually... but I'll<n>do my best
for the race! I'm gonna<n>go all-out Bakushin, just
like you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
HAAA HA HA HA! That's the spirit!<n>Run like me
and first place is surely<n>yours!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Simply Bakushin forward with all your<n>might, and
you'll be at the finish line<n>before you know it!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: LET'S BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Thus, the much-anticipated race<n>begins. After
hearing so much praise<n>about Bakushin O's little
sister, she's<n>the focus of my attention.

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff! I've gottaBakushin... even harder!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff! Tenth... place... B-BigSis, I'm so sorry... I couldn't run likeyou...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ba... Ba-ba-ba... Ba...
choice_data_list: It's too bad, but I'm sure you'll do better next—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: BAKUSHIN-TASTIC! I'M SO<n>TOUCHED!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Sob! To think I'd get to see mybaby sis fly across the turf in a race!They grow up so fast!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Your brave, dignified, incredible<n>running was a
Bakushin straight to<n>my heart! The tears, they
won't stop!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: B-but I came tenth... I did so poorly...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean? Tenth's<n>amazing! The way
you gave it your all<n>out there was so electrifying,
it set the<n>world on fire!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Your run was more than worthy of a<n>class
rep—no, a national rep—no, a<n>world rep! Everyone
should follow<n>your Bakushin example!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So don't worry. You'll win the next<n>meet without
fail! You were more<n>brilliant, beautiful, and
Bakushin than<n>anyone!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: A-ahaha... You think so? Um... thanks,<n>Sis.

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
Still... I wish my running could've<n>been as cool as
yours...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite Sakura Bakushin O's words<n>of
encouragement, her little sister<n>trudges away
looking dejected.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wha?! N-n-no way! She's unhappy?!<n>Why?!
choice_data_list: You should give her some time alone.
You should give her some time alone.

Maybe a special training session would cheer
her up!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wha?! N-n-no way! She's unhappy?!<n>Why?!
choice_data_list: You should give her some time alone.
You should give her some time alone.

Maybe a special training session would cheer
her up!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It might be hard for Sakura Bakushin<n>O to get
why her sister's feeling<n>down. Some time alone
might be the<n>solution.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I should?! D-does that mean... no<n>Bakushin?
choice_data_list: It's plenty Bakushin to just watch over her!
It's plenty Bakushin to just watch over her!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I see! Truly, the art of Bakushin is<n>deep!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Together, we watch her little sister<n>walk away,
knowing she'll only come<n>out of this stronger.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense! When you're<n>feeling down,
Bakushin gets you<n>back up! Worries, problems,
and even<n>tragedies—there's nothing it can't
solve!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Sister of mine! Let's run back home!<n>I'll be your
hot-blooded Bakushin<n>personal coach!

text_block_list.name: Bakushin O's Little Sister
text_block_list.text:
Sis... Yeah, you're right. Feeling down<n>won't do
me any good!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Shoot for the stars! BAKUSHIIIN!
